untranslatable_reason: Signal requires microstructure-level order book analysis (quantity imbalance tracking, cross-market order flow correlation, intra-second timing windows, and specific order size deviation metrics) which cannot be constructed from OHLCV candle-based indicators. Required inputs: real-time order imbalance magnitude, multi-venue order flow synchronization, tick-level quantity tracking across >1 market simultaneously, and sub-5-second cross-venue latency confirmation—none available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_17_0 is a high-frequency microstructure arbitrage signal designed for tick-by-tick execution. The core logic depends on: (1) detecting quantity imbalances at 2σ threshold in real-time order book, (2) confirming matching imbalances in correlated markets within 5 seconds, (3) verifying 3 consecutive updates of directional consistency, (4) correlating with visible price dislocation ≥50bps. No single OHLCV indicator (volume, vol_ratio_20, hvol_20) can capture order imbalance state or cross-venue order flow dynamics. This signal requires direct order book access and cannot be meaningfully backtested on candle data.
